title: Crystal & Ash: The Buddha at Piprahwa
description: The holy relics of Buddha Shakyamuni, part of the relics originally excavated in 1898 from the Piprahwa Stupa in the Terai region of northern Uttar Pradesh, were repatriated to India in 2025 after 127 years. Marg magazine’s volume 77 (2) is a deep dive into the history, Buddhist cultural landscape, colonial archaeology and museology, and Buddhism’s veneration of these relics. The post Crystal & Ash: The Buddha at Piprahwa appeared first on Gateway House.
